response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems and open-source tools
Demonstrated leadership in dev-ops, testing, and technical education
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
Zero evidence of networking security technologies or switch firmware development
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of Network Security Tech Exposure
